'''ân-d-y-w''' ('''kanadyewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yealm|yealm]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-d-y-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yealm|yealm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-d-y-w
|-
! Lemma
| kanadyewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinadyewoko|thinadyewoko]] || [[word:jinadyewoko|jinadyewoko]] || [[word:shinadyewoko|shinadyewoko]] || [[word:kinadyewoko|kinadyewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunadyewoko|thuthunadyewoko]] || [[word:jujunadyewoko|jujunadyewoko]] || [[word:shushunadyewoko|shushunadyewoko]] || [[word:kukunadyewoko|kukunadyewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunadyewoko|thunadyewoko]] || [[word:junadyewoko|junadyewoko]] || [[word:shunadyewoko|shunadyewoko]] || [[word:kunadyewoko|kunadyewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonadyewoko|thonadyewoko]] || [[word:jonadyewoko|jonadyewoko]] || [[word:shonadyewoko|shonadyewoko]] || [[word:konadyewoko|konadyewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnadyewoko|thĂŠnadyewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠnadyewoko|jĂŠnadyewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠnadyewoko|shĂŠnadyewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠnadyewoko|kĂŠnadyewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
